characters.description: The farmer at the center of Fa Ram, known elsewhere as Jin Jue. Married to Meiling, he prepares to take an exceptional rice harvest to Pale Moon Lake City while seeking expert help for a damaged crystal.
characters.name: Jin

characters.description: Jin's wife and a healer who remains at Fa Ram while he travels. She oversees the household, continues medical research for the Hong archives, and helps plan the farm's next practical projects.
characters.name: Meiling

characters.description: Jin's cat disciple, traveling with Cai Xiulan and the Fa Ram party toward the Dueling Peaks tournament.
characters.name: Tigu

characters.description: A Verdant Blade cultivator traveling with members of Jin's household toward the Dueling Peaks tournament.
characters.name: Cai Xiulan

characters.description: A spirit beast and Fa Ram disciple traveling with Tigu and the tournament party through Pale Moon Lake City.
characters.name: Ri Zu

characters.description: A member of Jin's household who accompanies Cai Xiulan and the Fa Ram party toward the Dueling Peaks tournament.
characters.name: Gou Ren

characters.description: An image-crystal maker traveling with the Fa Ram group. In Pale Moon Lake City, he collaborates with a crystal-carver friend on improvements to recording crystals.
characters.name: Yun Ren

characters.description: Yun Ren's friend and collaborator in Pale Moon Lake City. She develops recording crystals with focusing lenses, appraises the group's damaged crystal, and offers to seek a senior expert's examination.
characters.name: Crystal carver

characters.description: A senior disciple of the Cloudy Sword Sect who is searching for Jin Jue. Lu Ri has verified a lead in Verdant Hill, but conflicting reports leave him uncertain about where his quarry has gone.
characters.name: Lu Ri

characters.description: Jin's first disciple and a rooster guardian of Fa Ram. Bi De travels with Jin to Pale Moon Lake City, where he hopes to recover the information held in a badly damaged crystal and understand its importance.
characters.name: Bi De

characters.description: An awakened rabbit and disciple of Fa Ram who travels with Jin to Pale Moon Lake City.
characters.name: Yin

characters.description: An awakened snake and disciple of Jin who accompanies him and the damaged crystal to Pale Moon Lake City.
characters.name: Miantiao

characters.description: The Verdant Blade Sectmaster and Cai Xiulan's father. He helps decide that the sect will respect and welcome Jin's household.
characters.name: Cai Xiulan's father

characters.description: A leading young woman from the Misty Lake Sect who meets Gou Ren in the tournament town and regards Cai Xiulan as her rival.
characters.name: Misty Lake Sect young mistress

characters.description: The Misty Lake Sect young mistress previously encountered by Gou Ren. She proposes exchanging training pointers with him after the tournament and renews her challenge to Cai Xiulan.
characters.name: Liu Xianghua

characters.description: A Shrouded Mountain Sect operative sent to scout talent at the Dueling Peaks. Lu Ban arrives with powerful defenses, several subordinates, ambitious plans for the gathering, and a hostile history connected to Jin Jue.
characters.name: Lu Ban

characters.description: A young master of the Hermetic Iron Sect. He confronts Tigu after her bout with his junior, then recognizes that she used the match to teach rather than humiliate her opponent.
characters.name: Hermetic Iron young master

characters.description: An independent Dueling Peaks competitor with an unpolished fighting style and a trained palm technique. Loud Boy advances by defeating his companion Rags after a hard, closely contested bout.
characters.name: Loud Boy

characters.description: An independent tournament fighter and Loud Boy's companion. Rags competes directly against him at the Dueling Peaks, bringing determination and familiarity to a bout between close associates.
characters.name: Rags

characters.description: A company representative who arranges Jin's purchases and researches available medical texts and anatomical diagrams. She also handles caravan planning and considers the requirements of a southern search for rare fruit.
characters.name: Azure Jade Trading Company logistics representative

characters.description: The damaged land spirit bound to Fa Ram, appearing in Meiling's dreams as a frightened golden child. Its dragon veins are broken, its memories are scattered, and it struggles to help Jin return safely.
characters.name: Fa Ram earth spirit

characters.description: A boar of Fa Ram who helps manage the forest with Pi Pa and Wa Shi, producing a substantial harvest of mushrooms and medicinal fungi.
characters.name: Chun Ke

characters.description: A member of Fa Ram's household who tends the forest alongside Chun Ke and Wa Shi. Their work yields plentiful mushrooms and medicinal fungi.
characters.name: Pi Pa

characters.description: A member of Fa Ram's household who can take dragon form. He helps Chun Ke and Pi Pa manage the forest and cultivate mushrooms and medicinal fungi.
characters.name: Wa Shi

characters.description: Jin Jue's adoptive grandfather, who raised him despite their lack of blood relationship. A delayed letter confirms that Gramps is alive, away on an undisclosed duty, and has left Jin a gift that will open at a later cultivation stage.
characters.name: Gramps

characters.description: The other conscious remnant within Jin's shared existence, rather than a separate traveling companion. Joe and Jin Jue confront their intertwined continuity and decide together what life and family they will protect.
characters.name: Joe

characters.description: Liu Xianghua's younger brother, who uses crutches because of a damaged leg and cannot cultivate. He befriends Gou Ren and Yun Ren at the Dueling Peaks.
characters.name: Liu Bowu

characters.description: The artisan and leader of a secluded monkey settlement at Crystal Hill. He speaks through a throat crystal and agrees to transfer an ancient recording in exchange for knowledge about his clan's former master.
characters.name: Crystal Hill monkey clan leader

characters.description: A conscious blade that helps Yun Ren fight a Shrouded Mountain pursuer. Summer's Sky takes in lightning, sends it back, and chooses him as the eighth person to wield it.
characters.name: Summer's Sky

characters.description: A mortal worker at the Dueling Peaks whose unusual affinity with the old maintenance system lets him activate its controls and open sealed routes that the elders cannot.
characters.name: Dueling Peaks maintenance worker

characters.description: Bi De's disciple and a local village defender. Wearing a rooster mask and carrying a spear, Zheng Fei patrols beside the small dog Shaggy Two and stops thieves who threaten his neighbors' sheep.
characters.name: Zheng Fei
